stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct concerning rotors below the crest of a mountain wave?

options.a: The rotors are always visible by the presence of rotor clouds.
options.b: The wind direction at the lower side of the rotors is opposite to the prevailing wind direction.
options.c: The axis of these rotors is vertical.
options.d: The wind direction at the top of the rotors is opposite to the prevailing wind direction.
